2605.18068.title: Improving Spatio-Temporal Residual Error Propagation by Mitigating Over-Squashing
2605.18068.paper_summary: Residual error propagation remains a fundamental problem in recurrent models, where small prediction inaccuracies compound over time and degrade long-horizon performance. Accurately modeling the correlation structure of such residuals is critical for reliable uncertainty quantification in probabilistic multivariate timeseries forecasting. While recent time-series deep models efficiently parametrize time-varying contemporaneous correlations, they often assume temporal independence of errors and neglect spatial correlation across the observed network. In this paper, we introduce Teger, a structured uncertainty module that overcomes the spa- tial and temporal limitations of error-correlated autoregressive forecasting. Teger proposes a spatial curvature-aware graph rewiring mechanism explicitly strengthening information-bottleneck edges identified by discrete Forman curvature. The component is integrated into a low-rank-plus-diagonal covariance head, preserving tractable inference via the Woodbury identity. Teger is backbone-agnostic, requiring only the latent state produced by any autoregressive encoder. We provide theoretical evidence of Teger, and experimentally evaluate it on LSTM, Transformer, and xLSTM backbones across four real-world spatio-temporal datasets, showing consistent improvement in Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS). We further provide a formal theoretical analysis connecting curvature-aware rewiring to (i) oversquashing alleviation, (ii) improved spectral connectivity, (iii) reduced effective resistance, and (iv) improved covariance calibration bounds
2605.18068.paper_summary_zh: 殘差誤差傳播仍然是循環模型中的一個基本問題，其中小的預測不準確性隨時間累積並降低長期性能。準確建模這些殘差的相關結構對於在概率多變量時間序列預測中可靠的不確定性量化至關重要。雖然最近的時間序列深度模型有效地參數化時間變化的同時相關性，但它們通常假設誤差的時間獨立性，並忽略觀察網絡中的空間相關性。在本文中，我們介紹了Teger，一個結構化的不確定性模塊，克服了誤差相關自回歸預測的空間和時間限制。Teger提出了一種空間曲率感知的圖重連接機制，明確加強了由離散Forman曲率識別的信息瓶頸邊。該組件集成到一個低秩加對角的協方差頭中，通過Woodbury恒等式保持可處理的推斷。Teger是背骨無關的，只需任何自回歸編碼器產生的潛在狀態。我們提供了Teger的理論證據，並在LSTM、Transformer和xLSTM背骨上對其進行實驗評估，涵蓋四個現實世界的時空數據集，顯示在連續排名概率分數（CRPS）上持續改進。我們進一步提供了將曲率感知重連接與（i）過度壓縮緩解、（ii）改進的光譜連通性、（iii）降低的有效電阻和（iv）改進的協方差校準界限相連接的正式理論分析。
2605.18068.author: Seyed Mohamad Moghadas et.al.
2605.18068.authors: Seyed Mohamad Moghadas, Esther Rodrigo Bonet, Bruno Cornelis, Adrian Munteanu
